settings.name: Carnicería Mincho
settings.slogan: Carnes seleccionadas y atención de barrio en San José de Maipo
settings.slogan_en: Premium selected meats and friendly local service in San José de Maipo
settings.address: Comercio 19881, San José de Maipo, Región Metropolitana
settings.hours_en: Monday to Saturday · 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM

products.name: Filete
products.description: El corte más blando del vacuno. Ideal para la plancha, medallones o un lomo a lo pobre de lujo.
products.description_en: The most tender beef cut. Ideal for steaks, medallions, or a premium lomo a lo pobre.

products.name: Lomo liso
products.description: Magro y parejo, de sabor suave. Excelente a la parrilla o a la plancha en churrascos.
products.description_en: Lean and uniform, with a mild flavor. Excellent for the grill or sliced thin for churrascos.

products.name: Lomo vetado
products.description: Infiltrado y jugoso, el rey de la parrilla chilena. Perfecto para asar entero o en bistecs gruesos.
products.description_en: Marbled and juicy, the king of the Chilean grill. Perfect for roasting whole or thick steaks.

products.name: Asiento
products.description: Corte muy blando y con poca grasa, ideal para bistec, churrasco, tataki o asado al horno rápido.
products.description_en: Very tender and lean cut, ideal for beef steaks, churrascos, tataki, or quick oven roasting.

products.name: Posta negra
products.description: Magra y de fibra corta, la favorita para el pastel de choclo, empanadas y las carnes al jugo.
products.description_en: Lean and short-grained, the favorite for shepherd's pie (pastel de choclo), empanadas, and braised beef.

products.name: Posta rosada
products.description: Magra y versátil. Perfecta para bistecs a la plancha, escalopas o carne mechada.
products.description_en: Lean and versatile. Perfect for pan-fried steaks, escalopes (milanesas), or shredded beef (mechada).

products.name: Posta paleta
products.description: Corte jugoso y sabroso extraído de la paleta. Ideal para bistecs, guisos o carne mechada.
products.description_en: Juicy and flavorful cut from the shoulder. Ideal for steaks, stews, or shredded beef.

products.name: Punta de ganso
products.description: Clásico de los asados chilenos, con su capa de grasa que lo mantiene jugoso a las brasas.
products.description_en: A Chilean grilling classic, with a thick fat cap that keeps it incredibly juicy on the embers.

products.name: Pollo ganso
products.description: Corte magro y de forma cilíndrica regular, excelente para carne mechada, asados o para cortar laminado.
products.description_en: Lean, cylindrical cut, excellent for shredded beef (mechada), roasting, or sliced thin.

products.name: Posta molida
products.description: Posta seleccionada molida en el día, ideal para tártaro, albóndigas o salsas bajas en grasa.
products.description_en: Freshly ground lean beef, ideal for tartare, meatballs, or traditional meat fillings.

products.name: Churrascos
products.description: Láminas muy delgadas de vacuno tierno y magro, ideales para el clásico sándwich chileno.
products.description_en: Very thinly sliced tender beef, perfect for the classic Chilean sandwich.

products.name: Sobrecostilla
products.description: Clásica de la olla: cazuelas, carbonadas y guisos con mucho sabor.
products.description_en: A classic for pot cooking: perfect for rich beef stews, soups (cazuelas), and casseroles.

products.name: Plateadas
products.description: El corte tradicional para cocinar a la olla o al horno por horas, quedando tierno y meloso.
products.description_en: The traditional cut for slow-cooking in the oven or pot for hours until meltingly tender.

products.name: Tapapecho
products.description: El brisket chileno: con buena grasa e ideal para ahumados, horno o a la olla bien sazonado.
products.description_en: Chilean brisket: well-marbled, ideal for smoking, oven baking, or slow-pot roasting.

products.name: Carnicero
products.description: El secreto del maestro carnicero: sabroso, firme y parrillero por excelencia.
products.description_en: The butcher's secret: flavorful, firm, and excellent for grilling or pot roasting.

products.name: Abastero
products.description: Gelatinoso y lleno de sabor, ideal para estofados, cazuelas y cocciones largas a la olla.
products.description_en: Gelatinous and full of flavor, ideal for stews, soups, and slow pot cooking.

products.name: Carne molida
products.description: Molida del día con cortes seleccionados. Para empanadas, tallarines y hamburguesas caseras.
products.description_en: Freshly ground daily from selected cuts. Perfect for empanadas, pasta sauces, and homemade burgers.

products.name: Osobuco
products.description: Con hueso y tuétano central, ideal para cazuelas y guisos cocinados lentamente.
products.description_en: Bone-in cut with marrow, perfect for slow-cooked stews and hearty soups.

products.name: Aletillas
products.description: Corte sabroso con hueso, perfecto para aportar sabor a cazuelas tradicionales y caldos.
products.description_en: Flavorful bone-in cut, perfect for adding rich flavor to traditional stews and broths.

products.name: Cazuela coluda
products.description: Corte de vacuno con hueso de la cola, ideal para preparar una cazuela reponedora y muy sabrosa.
products.description_en: Bone-in tail cut, ideal for preparing a traditional, hearty and extremely flavorful soup.

products.name: Asado de tira
products.description: Con hueso y bien infiltrado, para la parrilla a fuego lento o una cazuela contundente.
products.description_en: Bone-in and nicely marbled, perfect for slow grilling or a hearty soup.

products.name: Cochezuela
products.description: Corte magro y tierno ideal para bistecs delgados, escalopas o sabrosos guisos de carne.
products.description_en: Lean and tender cut from the leg, excellent for thin steaks, breaded cutlets, or tasty stews.

products.name: Puchero
products.description: Hueso con carne seleccionada, ideal para sopas, caldos sustanciosos y cocidos tradicionales.
products.description_en: Selected bones with meat, ideal for soups, rich broths, and traditional stews.

products.name: Huesos
products.description: Huesos ideales para caldos, sopas y dar profundidad de sabor a las cazuelas.
products.description_en: Carcass bones, ideal for broths, stocks, and adding depth of flavor to soups.

products.name: Palanca
products.description: Corte delgado y magro, de sabor intenso. Perfecto para una cocción rápida a la parrilla.
products.description_en: Thin and lean cut with intense flavor. Perfect for a quick sear on the grill.

products.name: Entraña
products.description: Corte parrillero de sabor intenso y textura única. Vuelta y vuelta a fuego fuerte.
products.description_en: Flavorful parrillero cut with a unique texture. Grill quickly over high heat.

products.name: Tapabarriga
products.description: Clásico corte parrillero chileno, con su capa de grasa crujiente. Excelente al horno o parrilla.
products.description_en: Classic Chilean grilling cut with a crispy fat layer. Excellent baked or grilled.

products.name: Punta picana
products.description: Tierna y sabrosa, ideal al horno con papas doradas o a la parrilla en cortes gruesos.
products.description_en: Tender and flavorful, ideal baked in the oven with potatoes or grilled in thick cuts.

products.name: Punta paleta
products.description: Corte de sabor pronunciado y muy tierno (del cual se extrae el flat iron). Ideal para plancha o parrilla.
products.description_en: Highly flavorful and tender cut (from which flat iron is cut). Ideal for the grill or skillet.

products.name: Pollo barriga
products.description: Corte sabroso y de cocción rápida a la parrilla, con gran textura y sabor.
products.description_en: Savory and quick-cooking cut for the grill, with great texture and flavor.

products.name: Huachalomo
products.description: Sabroso y económico, para churrascos, chorrillanas o a las brasas a fuego lento.
products.description_en: Savory and economical, perfect for steaks, chorrillanas, or slow-grilling on the embers.

products.name: Choclillo
products.description: Corte alargado, magro y sin grasa. Ideal para carne al jugo, asados o mechada.
products.description_en: Elongated, lean cut with no fat. Ideal for braised beef, oven roasting, or pot roast.

products.name: Costillar
products.description: Para el horno o la parrilla a fuego lento. Con ajo y merkén, un clásico chileno.
products.description_en: For oven baking or slow grilling. Seasoned with garlic and merkén, a Chilean classic.

products.name: Chuleta vetada
products.description: Corte tierno y jugoso gracias a su infiltración de grasa, perfecto para plancha o parrilla.
products.description_en: Tender and juicy pork chop thanks to its marbled fat, perfect for pan or grill.

products.name: Chuleta centro
products.description: Chuletas de cerdo magras y tiernas, ideales para la comida diaria al sartén o plancha.
products.description_en: Lean and tender pork chops, ideal for everyday cooking in a skillet or on the grill.

products.name: Pulpa
products.description: Pulpa de cerdo versátil y rendidora. Excelente para hornear, picar o preparar guisos.
products.description_en: Versatile and high-yielding pork cut. Excellent for baking, roasting, or stews.

products.name: Pernil
products.description: Pernil de cerdo tierno, clásico para cocciones largas al agua o al horno. Muy sabroso.
products.description_en: Tender pork shank, classic for slow boiling or roasting. Very flavorful.

products.name: Manos de cerdo
products.description: Patitas de cerdo tradicionales, de gran textura y ricas en colágeno, ideales para caldos y guisos.
products.description_en: Traditional pork feet, gelatinous and perfect for hearty stews.

products.name: Cazuela de cerdo
products.description: Trozos seleccionados de cerdo con hueso, ideales para preparar una cazuela bien sabrosa.
products.description_en: Selected bone-in pork chunks, ideal for preparing a flavorful traditional soup.

products.name: Tocino
products.description: Panceta de cerdo ahumada, con el sabor y grasa ideales para acompañar huevos o dar sabor a tus platos.
products.description_en: Smoked pork belly, with the ideal flavor and fat to accompany eggs or season your dishes.

products.name: Trutro entero
products.description: Jugoso y económico, al horno con papas o a la parrilla marinado.
products.description_en: Juicy and economical, perfect roasted with potatoes or marinated on the grill.

products.name: Pechuga entera
products.description: Pechuga entera de pollo con hueso, ideal para deshuesar, hornear o desmenuzar.
products.description_en: Whole bone-in chicken breast, ideal for deboning, roasting, or shredding.

products.name: Trutro ala
products.description: Trutro de ala de pollo, sabroso y jugoso, ideal para preparar al horno o fritos tipo picoteo.
products.description_en: Savory and juicy chicken wing drumettes, ideal for baking or frying as finger food.

products.name: Patas de pollo
products.description: Patitas de pollo limpias y frescas, excelentes para caldos concentrados llenos de colágeno.
products.description_en: Cleaned and fresh chicken feet, excellent for collagen-rich concentrated broths.

products.name: Pana
products.description: Panitas de pollo frescas, ideales para preparar un paté casero o saltear con cebolla.
products.description_en: Fresh chicken livers, perfect for homemade pâté or sautéed with onions.

products.name: Prieta
products.description: Prietas tradicionales con aliño criollo, ideales para la parrilla o acompañar con papas cocidas.
products.description_en: Traditional Chilean blood sausages with local spices, perfect for the grill or boiled.

products.name: Guata callo
products.description: Guatitas de vacuno (mondongo) limpias y tiernas, ideales para guatitas a la jardinera.
products.description_en: Clean and tender beef tripe, ideal for the classic 'guatitas a la jardinera'.

products.name: Pata de vacuno
products.description: Pata de vacuno ideal para cocer a fuego lento, aportando una gran textura colagenosa y sabor.
products.description_en: Cow heel/foot ideal for slow cooking, providing a rich collagenous texture and deep flavor.

products.name: Chunchules
products.description: Chunchules de vacuno limpios y trenzados, listos para asar a la parrilla bien crujientes con limón.
products.description_en: Cleaned and braided beef small intestines, ready to grill until crispy and serve with lemon.

products.name: Longanizas
products.description: Longanizas de receta artesanal con condimentos seleccionados. Ideales para parrilladas y choripán.
products.description_en: Artisanal recipe pork sausages with selected seasonings. Ideal for grills and choripanes.
